creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Anton and Pavel,

thanks for your feedback regarding this problem report, however I am
not sure what to do here...
Pavel you say that the SQLLOG option should be disabled by default, but
this is already the case.
Anton you would like to add a BROKEN statement to indicate svn could
not be built in case sqlite was built with SQLLOG?

Could you please clarify the course of action to be taken here?

Thanks,
Frederic
